title: Cursor Launches AI-Native IDE with Built-in Model Fine-tuning
content: Cursor announced their new AI-native IDE that includes built-in model fine-tuning capabilities. Developers can now fine-tune code generation models on their organization's private repositories directly from the editor. The IDE tracks which suggestions are accepted or rejected and uses this feedback to personalize future completions. A new 'agent mode' allows the AI to autonomously refactor entire modules while maintaining test compatibility. The company also released benchmarks showing 40% fewer bugs in AI-generated code compared to generic models.
